description: Verso: Accounts with various types of coinage and goods mentioned. Likely dating to the sixteenth century on the basis of numismatic evidence. Two of the accounts mention "Brahīmī" coinage alongside bunduqī (gold ducats) and fiḍḍa (possibly medin). The term "Brahīmī" could be a reference to coinage that was minted during or after Avraham Castro's tenure as overseer of the Ottoman mint in Cairo (1520-1524 CE). For more on this terminology, see: https://geniza.github.io/paleographicalglossary/item.html?id=ccg0039. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
